name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-24
title: Delete dead production scripts: audit-orphan-storage.py, check-maps-consistent.py, render-template.py, dispatch-spec-update.py, rabbit-triage.py
description:
Five scripts under .claude/features/contract/scripts/ have no production callers (grep outside contract/ and archive/ returns zero):
- audit-orphan-storage.py (depends on non-existent registry.json)
- check-maps-consistent.py (depends on non-existent registry.json)
- render-template.py (no test exercises behavior; only existence checks)
- dispatch-spec-update.py (spec-update flow absorbed into rabbit-spec / rabbit-feature-touch)
- rabbit-triage.py (triage workflow subsumed by rabbit-file / rabbit-spec)

Also delete: schemas/registry.json.schema.json (no consumer) and the orphan tests/test_python_scripts.py (entire tests/ plural directory; not invoked by test/run.py, fully duplicates test-python-only-stack.py + test-files-exist.py).

Also delete the stale __pycache__/rabbit_print.cpython-37.pyc committed to repo.

Update any test files (test-files-exist.py, test-bug-fixes-cycle.py) and contract.md provides.scripts to remove references to deleted scripts. ~650 lines of dead code + tests.
